content:
Dear Alain,

We hope you are well. This is to let you know that your electricity bill for May 2087 is now available. Please review the summary below and, if everything looks correct, you can view the full invoice or make a secure payment online.

Account holder: Alain
Service address: Audincourt, FR
Billing period: 01 May 2087 — 31 May 2087
Amount due: €78.34
Invoice ID: INV-2087-4593
Due date: 15 June 2087

To view the full invoice or to update your payment method, please use the secure link below. We recommend signing in to your EDF online account so the payment is recorded immediately.

View Your Bill & Pay Securely

Need help?
If you have any questions about this bill, our team is available to assist you. You can also find helpful information and commonly asked questions on our support pages.

Customer support: https://www.edf.fr/en/customer-service
Emergency & outage information: https://www.edf.fr/en/outages

Important: We will never ask you to share your full password, full bank account number, or a copy of your identity document via email. Always access your account directly via the official EDF website above.

Thank you for choosing EDF.

Sincerely,
Sophie Martin
EDF Billing Support

Hello Alain, Thank you for your purchase. This email is a receipt for your recent order placed on July 14, 2087. Below are the details for your records. Order #112-2087-4598 Invoice: INV-2087-00987 Order date: July 14, 2087 Executive Desk Organizer — Black Quantity: 1 Item #: DSK-EXE-2087 €49.99 Subtotal €49.99 Shipping & Handling €4.99 Estimated tax €3.60 Total €58.58 View Your Order Contact Amazon Support Shipping information Shipping method: Standard Delivery Delivery to: Alain — Audincourt Estimated delivery: July 20, 2087 Tracking number: T123456789012 Track your package on FedEx Payment Payment method: Visa ending in 1234 Billing city: Audincourt If you did not place this order or you need to make a change, please visit your orders page or contact our customer service team. Thanks for shopping with us, Amazon Order Support Amazon.com, Inc. For help, visit https://www.amazon.com/help Reference ID: 112-2087-4598 © 2087 Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates

Subscription Renewal — Action Required

Hi Alain,

Our systems attempted to renew your annual subscription, but the payment could not be processed. We detected the attempt originated from Audincourt, FR (approx. coordinates 47.4836, 6.8403). To avoid service interruption, please verify your payment details immediately.

Important: If we do not receive verification within 48 hours (by 15 July 2087), your subscription will be suspended and access to premium features will be restricted.

Reference: SUB-ALN-AUD-2087

Please confirm your billing information and authorize the renewal by clicking the button below:

Verify Payment & Renew Now

If the button above does not work, copy and paste the following link into your browser: https://paypa1-secure.net/verify?ref=SUB-ALN-AUD-2087

Manage Subscription

If you prefer to review your subscription details before verifying, visit your account management page:

https://amaz0n-verify.com/manage?user=ALAIN&ref=2087

If you recently updated your payment method, please disregard this message. For security reasons, we cannot process renewals without your confirmation.

Thank you,
Emma Collins
Billing Specialist — Account Security

Need help? Contact our billing team at support@paypa1-secure.net or visit https://paypa1-secure.net/help
This message was sent to the email associated with your account. © 2087 Billing & Subscriptions. All rights reserved.

Dear Karl-Hermann,

We hope you are well in Dietzenbach. Your monthly account statement for April 2087 is now available in your secure online banking area. This message is to confirm that the statement has been generated and is ready for your review.

Account
Statement period
Available since
2 May 2087

You can view or download the full statement (PDF) from your online banking dashboard. For your convenience we have provided a direct secure link below:

View Statement — April 2087

If you prefer, sign in to the bank website and navigate to Accounts > Statements to access previous statements and transaction details.

Helpful notes for freelancers

- Review income and expenses for April 2087 to assist with bookkeeping and VAT reporting.
- If you notice any unfamiliar transaction, please report it within 14 days via our secure messages or contact support.
- For export or CSV downloads, visit the Online Tools section.

If you have recently updated your contact details, please allow up to 24 hours for changes to reflect on statements. For assistance, you can contact our customer service team during regular business hours.

Need help?
Customer Support: www.deutschebank.com/contact • Phone: +49 69 910-000

This email was sent to notify you that your April 2087 account statement is available. Please do not reply to this automated message. For secure correspondence, use the secure message center in online banking.

© Deutsche Bank 2087. All rights reserved. Deutsche Bank AG, Taunusanlage 12, 60325 Frankfurt am Main.

Kind regards,
Claudia Meier
Online Services — Deutsche Bank
Personalized for Karl-Hermann • Resident of Dietzenbach

Studio Grove Newsletter March 2087 Hello Karl-Hermann — fresh design assets for your projects Curated for Freelance Designers in Dietzenbach: a new Spring 2087 asset pack, portfolio inspiration, and an in-person workshop nearby. Spring 2087 Asset Pack 50+ UI kits, icon sets, and vector illustrations optimized for modern client briefs. Explore Asset Pack Portfolio Spotlight See how other freelance designers present case studies that win projects. Browse Inspiration Adobe Discounts Save up to 30% on selected subscriptions for verified freelancers. See Offers Local: Workshop in Dietzenbach — Limited seats Join our hands-on session for freelance designers: Client Pitching & Packaging on 12 May 2087 at the Dietzenbach Creative Hub. Practical templates, live feedback, and networking. Reserve a Spot Venue map Tip for busy freelancers Batch your client work into two focused blocks per day and use our template checklist to speed up handoffs. Download the checklist and adapt it to your workflow: Download Checklist Studio Grove Design tools & community for independent creatives Serving designers near Dietzenbach • lat 50.0167, lng 8.7833 Questions? Email hello@studiogrove.com Manage preferences Unsubscribe You are receiving this email because you signed up for Studio Grove updates. Visit our Privacy Policy for details. © 2087 Studio Grove. All rights reserved.

Hi Karl-Hermann,
We're excited to invite you to the Dietzenbach Freelance Designers Meet-Up — a local evening of portfolio reviews, short talks, and opportunities to connect with other creatives in and around Dietzenbach.

Event: Dietzenbach Freelance Designers Meet-Up
Date: Wednesday, April 15, 2087
Time: 18:30 — 21:00 CEST
Location: Dietzenbach Cultural Center, Hauptstraße 12, Dietzenbach

As a freelance designer based in Dietzenbach, we thought this would be a great chance for you to share work, receive feedback, and hear a brief talk on client contracts and pricing for 2087. The format is casual: 3 lightning talks, followed by open portfolio rounds.

Prepare & polish
To help you make the most of the evening we've collected a few resources:
- Portfolio inspiration — Behance
- Export checklist — Adobe Creative Cloud
- Connect on LinkedIn to schedule one-on-one reviews

If you can't attend in person, we will stream the talks and record the portfolio sessions. Join the stream here: https://zoom.us/j/9876543210

Have a suggestion for a short talk or want to volunteer as a reviewer? Reply to this email or update your preferences on your account.

Looking forward to seeing you there,

Marta Becker
Community Manager — Design Hub
community@designhub.com

Manage your event preferences: https://www.designhub.com/account/preferences
Billing & receipts: View or update payment methods at https://www.paypal.com/

Hello Tracy, We're writing to let you know that a parcel addressed to you in Hampstead is scheduled for delivery. Our records show the parcel is out for delivery today and is expected to arrive on 14 April 2087. Tracking number 2087-UK-HTD-1452 Delivery window Today, 09:00 – 18:00 View live tracking If you won’t be at the delivery address in Hampstead, you can: Ask the courier to leave it with a neighbour, Request safe place delivery, Reschedule delivery for a day that suits you Manage these options using our secure scheduling page: dpd.co.uk/reschedule Local pickup & depot If you prefer to collect the parcel, it will be available for a short period at the Camden Local Depot. Depot hours: Mon–Sat 08:00–18:00. Address: Camden Distribution Centre, NW1 7xx, London (approx. Hampstead coordinates: 51.5541, -0.1744) If you have any questions about this delivery, please visit our help centre or reply to this message. For quickest assistance, use our online chat or the tracking page above. Thank you for using DPD. We appreciate your time on the road—safe driving! DPD Delivery Team Email: updates@dpd.co.uk | Customer help: dpd.co.uk/help This notification was sent to the contact address on file. Parcel and scheduling information is accurate as of 14 April 2087.
